Done. Here's a summary of findings and the fix:

**Root cause:** The LLM generating walker personas has a strong statistical preference for "Vera" as a first name. The service had no deduplication — it just appended every generated walker to the in-memory map, so over time the canvas accumulated many simultaneous "Vera X" walkers with different surnames and titles but identical first names.

The client-side code was not at fault — it simply replaces `auditionWalkers` wholesale from the API respo...(truncated)
